patches.summary: Cache key hashes Cookie/CSRF and other credential headers, not just the Bearer token.
patches.reason: Greptile P1/security: cookie-auth sessions shared a cache key because AuthHeader() returns only the Bearer token, so a re-login within the 5-minute TTL served the previous session's cached responses.

patches.summary: CheckRedirect strips all configured custom credential headers (x-csrftoken, etc.) on cross-host hops, not just Authorization.
patches.reason: Greptile P1/security: Go strips Authorization/Cookie cross-host but forwards custom headers verbatim, leaking the CSRF token to the redirect target.

patches.summary: Removed unused applyAuthFormat and its strings.ReplaceAll keep-alive guard.
patches.reason: Greptile: dead code kept compilable only by a 'var _ = strings.ReplaceAll' guard; strings is already used by Load().
